name: @wxyc/triangle-shows-etl
description: WXYC nightly pull ETL: mirror the triangle-shows concert calendar API into venues/concerts for the 16 Triangle venues the RHP venue-events-scraper doesn't cover, keyed on (source='triangle_shows', source_id='<venue_slug>:'+source_key). Runs between the venue-events-scraper (05:00 UTC) and the concerts-artist-resolver (05:15 UTC) so new rows get artist-resolved the same night. BS#1589.
